base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should reduce call_wall_acceptance_long hold-time and hidden MAE risk by requiring more durable strike acceptance and earlier realization. Main tradeoff is losing or underpaying one of the two convex call-wall winners; reject unless total net profit stays within 2% of run_044 and worst/average MAE or exposure efficiency improves.
label: promote
rationale: Use batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long as a stronger profile-local containment test. The latest leader still has zero realized losses and no slow >=12h trades, but the global -655.2 MAE comes from call_wall_acceptance_long, which is only 2 trades yet 8.5% of PnL. The prior call-wall TP test at 45 seconds and 4.5 points was flat, so the next logical experiment is not broader vetoing but a more decisive call-wall-only persistence plus realization constraint.
